# Polynomial Chaos Expansion

**Summary**: A regression-based, data-driven method that uses a polynomial expansion to represent the output of a model as a function of its input variables.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-astsauri|Astsauri, 2024]] applied Polynomial Chaos Expansion (PCE) to create surrogate models for faster uncertainty quantification.

## Key Results and Findings

- PCE achieved over 95% of MCS accuracy while requiring less than 1% of the computational time. ([[2024-astsauri|Astsauri, 2024, p. 13]])
